footer.description: We build loyalty, incentive, and rewards systems with regional execution, operational discipline, and technology built for growth.

detail: Physical and digital rewards across Latin America.
We coordinate providers, delivery, support, and reconciliation under one regional model.
Coverage adapts by country, reward category, and each program’s operating scope.

seo.title: Zegendia | Loyalty, rewards, and fulfillment for Latin America
seo.description: We design loyalty programs, incentive platforms, and regional rewards fulfillment for customers, teams, channels, and communities across LATAM.

hero.headline: The new loyalty infrastructure for LATAM.
hero.subheadline: Zegendia builds loyalty, rewards, gamification, and fulfillment systems for customers, companies, channels, teams, and communities across Latin America.

spotlight.title: Three layers, one regional operation
spotlight.text: Custom design, fast-launch software, and rewards fulfillment connected inside the same ecosystem.

positioning.title: We design loyalty, incentives, and rewards for multiple audiences.
positioning.text: Whether you want to increase repeat behavior, drive commercial volume, reward performance, or strengthen engagement, Zegendia can turn that behavior into an operational, measurable, and scalable experience.
positioning.panelTitle: Customers, channels, teams, and communities inside the same framework.
positioning.panelText: One ecosystem can adapt to B2C programs, B2B models, commercial channels, sales forces, employees, partners, and verticals with very different needs.

productCards.name: Zegendia Core
productCards.title: Custom loyalty ecosystems
productCards.description: Strategy, technology, campaigns, gamification, rewards, and operations for companies that need a loyalty model built around their business.

productCards.name: Oh My Rewards
productCards.title: Regional rewards fulfillment through one API
productCards.description: Connect your existing loyalty stack and deliver mobile top-ups, gift cards, and physical rewards in LATAM without managing stock, couriers, or country-by-country integrations.

productCards.name: PuntosPlus
productCards.title: Launch a program in minutes
productCards.description: The loyalty operating system for SMEs and growth-stage companies that want to motivate customers, buyers, teams, or channels without technical complexity.

selector.title: Who do you need to incentivize?
selector.description: Pick your audience and we will point you to the most logical entry point inside the Zegendia ecosystem.

customers.label: Customers
customers.explanation: If you need a complete loyalty program with points, tiers, promotions, and rewards, start with PuntosPlus or ask for a tailored build.

buyers.label: B2B buyers
buyers.explanation: B2B loyalty usually needs more commercial logic, validations, catalogs, and reporting. That is where Zegendia Core leads.

distributors.label: Distributors
distributors.explanation: We can design the program and also operate regional reward delivery with visibility, support, and monthly reconciliation.

sales.label: Sales teams
sales.explanation: From simple incentives to advanced target engines, streaks, and rankings, the ecosystem adapts to the size of your operation.

employees.label: Employees
employees.explanation: Recognition, anniversaries, internal campaigns, and physical or digital rewards with regional tracking.

communities.label: Communities
communities.explanation: When motivation depends on engagement, reputation, and experience design, a more customized path usually makes more sense.

existing.label: Existing loyalty users
existing.explanation: If you already have points, cashback, or loyalty and only need real rewards in LATAM, one API is the cleanest path.

flow.title: Behavior → rules → currency → rewards → delivery → measurement
steps: Define the audience and the behavior you want to move.
Configure rules, currencies, controls, and experiences.
Connect catalogs, rewards, fulfillment, and tracking.
Measure redemption, repeat behavior, activation, and business value.

latam.title: Real rewards across LATAM.
latam.text: Zegendia works with regional providers, catalogs, and delivery capabilities so your program does not rely on an improvised chain in every market.

ai.title: We use AI where it adds operational and commercial clarity.

cta.title: We design loyalty programs for very different business models.
cta.text: If there is a behavior you want to motivate, we can turn it into rules, benefits, rewards, and measurable operations, from growing companies to organizations with regional scale.

seo.title: About | Zegendia
seo.description: Discover Zegendia's evolution: real loyalty experience, regional reward operations, and a new SaaS vision for Latin America.

hero.title: Real experience in loyalty, rewards, and regional operations.
hero.text: Zegendia was built from execution: programs, catalogs, integrations, fulfillment, campaigns, and support across multiple Latin American markets.

story: For years, Zegendia helped brands turn customers and employees into fans through loyalty programs, gamification, rewards catalogs, and gift cards.

That operational work created a difficult advantage to replicate: understanding how programs behave in the real world, where they break, how to scale logistics, and what users expect when they redeem a reward.

Today that experience is organized into three connected lines: Zegendia Core for custom projects, Oh My Rewards for regional rewards fulfillment, and PuntosPlus as the loyalty operating system for LATAM.

capabilityIntro.title: Zegendia's edge is not only software. It is the combination of strategy, operations, and regional execution.
capabilityIntro.text: We design loyalty models for complex realities: multiple audiences, commercial rules, physical and digital rewards, local providers, integrations, and operational follow-through.

capabilities.title: Program design with real business logic
capabilities.text: We structure programs for customers, channels, teams, distributors, or communities with rules tied to measurable commercial objectives.

capabilities.title: Regional rewards and fulfillment operations
capabilities.text: We coordinate catalogs, providers, deliveries, support, and reconciliation so the redemption promise actually works across LATAM.

capabilities.title: Product, APIs, and integrations
capabilities.text: We connect loyalty engines to CRM, POS, ecommerce, fintech, or internal systems without losing visibility or speed.

capabilities.title: Account management and program growth
capabilities.text: We support activation, adoption, campaigns, engagement, and program evolution with both operational and commercial discipline.

timeline.title: Custom regional programs
timeline.text: Experience across B2C, employee loyalty, benefits, catalogs, and delivery for recognized brands in the region.

timeline.title: Operational maturity and rewards expansion
timeline.text: More focus on fulfillment, integration, provider management, and multi-country rewards operations.

timeline.title: New ecosystem: Core + Oh My Rewards + PuntosPlus
timeline.text: The same experience translated into a clearer architecture: consulting and custom builds, a regional API, and a SaaS layer built to operate loyalty in LATAM.

team.title: A distributed regional team built to design, operate, and scale loyalty in real market conditions.
team.text: Our team brings together strategy, product, technology, rewards operations, and client leadership to support loyalty programs with regional discipline and consistent execution across LATAM markets.

members.name: Valentina Rojas
members.focus: Program architecture, segmentation, value proposition, and loyalty journey design for enterprise accounts.

members.name: Tomás Herrera
members.focus: Catalogs, providers, SLAs, regional reconciliation, and the daily operation of physical and digital rewards.

members.name: Mariana Costa
members.focus: SaaS roadmap, rule configuration, admin experience, and the evolution of the loyalty operating system.

members.name: Andrés Vega
members.focus: APIs, webhooks, security, and integrations with CRM, POS, ecommerce, and fintech systems across the region.

members.name: Sofía Navarro
members.focus: Onboarding, performance reviews, account expansion, and sustained program adoption by client teams.

members.name: Camila Ortega
members.focus: Promotions, engagement mechanics, behavior-based activations, and campaign communication systems.

hero.title: Tell us what you want to move and we’ll tell you where to start.
hero.text: We can help you launch a full loyalty program, operate a regional rewards catalog, or connect your current system to real rewards across Latin America.
